Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: funerary vessels [300198642], funerary containers [300197579], ceremonial containers [300197576], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: urns [300129425], vessels (containers) [300193015], containers by form [300194507], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Vessels holding or intended to hold the ashes of cremated bodies.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Vasijas que contienen o están destinadas para guardar las cenizas de cuerpos cremados.
Vaten om as van gecremeerde lichamen in te bewaren.
盛裝火化遺體後所得骨灰或專為盛裝骨灰所設計的器皿。
Gefäß, das Asche eines kremierten Körpers enthält oder das dafür gedacht ist.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
